MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: DEFENDANT BMW OF NORTH AMERICA, LLC'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Matthew Berard's unopposed pro hac vice application is granted.

The moving party is to prepare and submit a proposed form of order that repeats verbatim the tentative ruling.

(302/RBU)
